title: rubus × consanguis
intro: Rubus × consanguis, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a plant species resulting from the cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × consanguis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Rubus × consanguis include jams, jellies, and teas, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and fruits in hot water.
